title: Virall pipeline parameters
description: Viral genome assembly and analysis pipeline

samples.description: Path to sample sheet CSV. Required columns: sample_id plus sequencing-read columns (illumina_r1, nanopore_reads, pacbio_reads, or iontorrent_r1).

outdir.description: Output directory for all pipeline results.

reference.description: Path to reference genome FASTA for reference-guided assembly and consensus calling.

reference_only.description: Skip de novo assembly; generate consensus directly from reference alignment only.

host_genome.description: Optional: Path to host genome FASTA for host read filtering (minimap2 + samtools).

quality_phred.description: Quality Phred threshold for short reads (fastp --qualified_quality_phred).

quality_phred_long.description: Quality Phred threshold for long reads (fastplong). Lower default for ONT/PacBio reads.

min_read_len.description: Minimum read length for short reads after trimming (fastp --length_required).

min_read_len_long.description: Minimum read length for long reads after trimming (fastplong --length_required).

long_read_tech.description: Long-read sequencing technology. Affects SPAdes, Flye, and minimap2 presets.

iontorrent.description: Enable Ion Torrent mode (adds --iontorrent to SPAdes, disables adapter trimming and poly-G trimming in fastp).

assembly_strategy.description: Assembly strategy. 'auto' detects from available reads; 'hybrid' uses Flye + short-read polishers; 'short_only' uses SPAdes; 'long_only' uses Flye.

rna_mode.description: Enable RNA virus mode (adds --rnaviral to SPAdes). Disables reference-guided assembly options.

metaviral_mode.description: Enable metaviralSPAdes mode (--metaviral). Note: disables --trusted-contigs when a reference is provided.

min_contig_len.description: Minimum contig length (bp) for viral filtering. Contigs below this threshold are excluded.

flye_min_overlap.description: Flye --min-overlap parameter. Lower values recover shorter viral genomes.

flye_genome_size.description: Flye --genome-size estimate (e.g. '30k'). Leave null for Flye to auto-estimate.

threads.description: Number of CPU threads per process.

kaiju_db.description: Path to Kaiju reference database directory (contains .fmi, nodes.dmp, names.dmp). Required for taxonomic classification.

checkv_db.description: Path to CheckV reference database directory (contains genome_db/checkv_reps.dmnd). Used for phage quality assessment.

genomad_db.description: Path to geNomad database directory. Used for RNA virus and eukaryotic virus quality assessment.

vog_db.description: Path to VOG (Virus Orthologous Groups) database directory. Used for functional gene annotation.

quant_mapq.description: MAPQ threshold for high-confidence read alignments in abundance estimation.

quant_min_breadth.description: Minimum contig coverage breadth (fraction 0-1) for abundance estimation. Contigs below this threshold are excluded from relative abundance calculations.

single_cell_mode.description: Enable single-cell processing mode (10x Genomics). Extracts cell barcodes, pools reads for assembly, then maps back to cells.

sc_chemistry.description: 10x Genomics chemistry version. Determines barcode length and UMI pattern.

sc_barcode_whitelist.description: Optional: Path to custom 10x barcode whitelist file. Uses umi_tools default if not provided.

sc_min_reads_per_cell.description: Minimum number of reads required to retain a cell barcode.

sc_min_viral_umis.description: Minimum viral UMIs to classify a cell as infected.
